mapper.insert: /* daily3gSubMapper.insert3gSubContNum1st */ INSERT INTO MSP_3G_SUB_CONTNUM (CONTRACT_NUM) SELECT SUB.CONTRACT_NUM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB , MSP_DAILY_CLOSE_STTC STTC WHERE SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = STTC.CONTRACT_NUM AND SUB.SUB_STATUS != 'C' AND SUB.PPPO = 'PO' AND STTC.LST_DATA_TYPE = '3G' AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_3G_SUB_CONTNUM WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM)

/* daily3gSubMapper.insert3gSubContNum2nd */ INSERT INTO MSP_3G_SUB_CONTNUM (CONTRACT_NUM) SELECT SUB.CONTRACT_NUM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB , MSP_DAILY_CLOSE_STTC STTC , MDS_INTM_SPEC_DTL SPEC WHERE SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = STTC.CONTRACT_NUM AND STTC.LST_PHONE_ID = SPEC.REP_INTM_MODEL_ID AND SUB.SUB_STATUS != 'C' AND SUB.PPPO = 'PO' AND SPEC.DATA_TYPE = '3' --3G AND SPEC.LTE_YN = 'N' --LTE미지원 AND SPEC.FIVEG_YN = 'N' --5G미지원 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_3G_SUB_CONTNUM WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM)

/* daily3gSubMapper.insert3gSubContNum3rd */ INSERT INTO MSP_3G_SUB_CONTNUM (CONTRACT_NUM) SELECT SUB.CONTRACT_NUM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB , MDS_INTM_SPEC_DTL SPEC WHERE SUB.USIM_MODID = SPEC.REP_INTM_MODEL_ID AND SUB.SUB_STATUS != 'C' AND SUB.PPPO = 'PO' AND SPEC.DATA_TYPE = '3' --3G AND SPEC.LTE_YN = 'N' --LTE미지원 AND SPEC.FIVEG_YN = 'N' --5G미지원 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_3G_SUB_CONTNUM WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM)

/* daily3gSubMapper.insert3gSubContNum4th */ INSERT INTO MSP_3G_SUB_CONTNUM (CONTRACT_NUM) SELECT SUB.CONTRACT_NUM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB , MSP_DAILY_CLOSE_STTC STTC , MDS_INTM_SPEC_DTL SPEC WHERE SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = STTC.CONTRACT_NUM AND STTC.LST_PHONE_ID = SPEC.REP_INTM_MODEL_ID AND SUB.SUB_STATUS != 'C' AND SUB.PPPO = 'PO' AND (SPEC.DATA_TYPE = '4' OR (SPEC.DATA_TYPE = '3' AND SPEC.LTE_YN = 'Y')) --4G AND SPEC.VOLTE_YN = 'N' --VOLTE미지원 AND SPEC.FIVEG_YN = 'N' --5G미지원 AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_3G_SUB_CONTNUM WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM)

/* daily3gSubMapper.insert3gSubContNum5th */ INSERT INTO MSP_3G_SUB_CONTNUM (CONTRACT_NUM) SELECT SUB.CONTRACT_NUM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB , MSP_DAILY_CLOSE_STTC STTC , MSP_REQUEST_DTL DTL WHERE SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = STTC.CONTRACT_NUM AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = DTL.CONTRACT_NUM AND SUB.SUB_STATUS != 'C' AND SUB.PPPO = 'PO' AND DTL.REQ_BUY_TYPE = 'UU' AND STTC.LST_PHONE_ID IS NULL AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_3G_SUB_CONTNUM WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM)

/* daily3gSubMapper.insertDaily3gSub */ INSERT INTO MSP_DAILY_3G_SUB ( STDR_DT, CONTRACT_NUM, REQ_BUY_TYPE, LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, BIRTH_DT, GENDER, SUB_STATUS, OPEN_AGNT_CD, OPEN_AGNT_NM, LST_RATE_CD, LST_RATE_NM, LST_RATE_TP, LST_MODEL_ID, LST_MODEL_NM, LST_MODEL_TP, MODEL_VOLTE_YN, MODEL_NFC_YN, LST_USIM_ID, LST_USIM_NM, LST_USIM_TP, USIM_VOLTE_YN, USIM_NFC_YN, BL_DC_TYPE, ARGM_STRT_DT, ARGM_END_DT, STOP_DT, STOP_RSN_CD, BILL_SEND_CD, REG_DTTM ) SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-1,'YYYYMMDD') AS STDR_DT , CONTRACT_NUM , REQ_BUY_TYPE , LST_COM_ACTV_DATE , SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(USER_SSN), 1, 6) AS BIRTH , SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(USER_SSN), 7, 1) AS GENDER , SUB_STATUS , OPEN_AGNT_CD , F_GET_AGENT_NM(OPEN_AGNT_CD) AS OPEN_AGNT_NM , LST_RATE_CD , LST_RATE_NM , DECODE(LST_RATE_TP,'3G','3','LTE','4','5G','5','') AS LST_RATE_TP , LST_MODEL_ID , LST_MODEL_NM , (SELECT CASE WHEN DATA_TYPE = '3' AND LTE_YN = 'N' AND FIVEG_YN = 'N' THEN '3' WHEN DATA_TYPE = '4' OR (DATA_TYPE = '3' AND LTE_YN = 'Y') THEN '4' WHEN DATA_TYPE = '5' OR (DATA_TYPE = '3' AND FIVEG_YN = 'Y') THEN '5' ELSE DATA_TYPE END FROM MDS_INTM_SPEC_DTL WHERE REP_INTM_MODEL_ID = AA.LST_MODEL_ID) AS LST_MODEL_TP , (SELECT VOLTE_YN FROM MDS_INTM_SPEC_DTL WHERE REP_INTM_MODEL_ID = AA.LST_MODEL_ID) AS MODEL_VOLTE_YN , (SELECT NFC_YN FROM MDS_INTM_SPEC_DTL WHERE REP_INTM_MODEL_ID = AA.LST_MODEL_ID) AS MODEL_NFC_YN , LST_USIM_ID , LST_USIM_NM , (SELECT CASE WHEN DATA_TYPE = '3' AND LTE_YN = 'N' AND FIVEG_YN = 'N' THEN '3' WHEN DATA_TYPE = '4' OR (DATA_TYPE = '3' AND LTE_YN = 'Y') THEN '4' WHEN DATA_TYPE = '5' OR (DATA_TYPE = '3' AND FIVEG_YN = 'Y') THEN '5' ELSE DATA_TYPE END FROM MDS_INTM_SPEC_DTL WHERE REP_INTM_MODEL_ID = AA.LST_USIM_ID) AS LST_USIM_TP , (SELECT VOLTE_YN FROM MDS_INTM_SPEC_DTL WHERE REP_INTM_MODEL_ID = AA.LST_USIM_ID) AS USIM_VOLTE_YN , (SELECT NFC_YN FROM MDS_INTM_SPEC_DTL WHERE REP_INTM_MODEL_ID = AA.LST_USIM_ID) AS USIM_NFC_YN , CASE WHEN SIM_INFO IS NOT NULL THEN TRIM(SUBSTR(SIM_INFO,1,2)) WHEN INST_INFO IS NOT NULL THEN TRIM(SUBSTR(INST_INFO,1,2)) ELSE '' END AS BL_DC_TYPE , CASE WHEN SIM_INFO IS NOT NULL THEN SUBSTR(SIM_INFO,20,8) WHEN INST_INFO IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(SUBSTR(INST_INFO,1,2)) IS NOT NULL THEN LST_COM_ACTV_DATE ELSE '' END AS ARGM_STRT_DT , CASE WHEN SIM_INFO IS NOT NULL THEN SUBSTR(SIM_INFO,28,8) WHEN INST_INFO IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(SUBSTR(INST_INFO,1,2)) IS NOT NULL THEN TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(TO_DATE(LST_COM_ACTV_DATE,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(INST_INFO,26,3)))-1 ,'YYYYMMDD') ELSE '' END AS ARGM_END_DT , DECODE(SUB_STATUS,'S',SUBSTR(SUB_STATUS_DATE,1,8),'') AS STOP_DT , DECODE(SUB_STATUS,'S',SUB_STATUS_RSN_CODE,'') AS STOP_RSN_CD , (SELECT BL_BILLING_METHOD FROM MSP_JUO_BAN_INFO WHERE BAN = AA.BAN) AS BILL_SEND_CD , SYSDATE FROM ( SELECT B.CONTRACT_NUM , C.REQ_BUY_TYPE , B.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE , B.USER_SSN , B.SUB_STATUS , B.OPEN_AGNT_CD , C.LST_RATE_CD , C.LST_RATE_NM , D.LST_DATA_TYPE AS LST_RATE_TP , D.LST_PHONE_ID AS LST_MODEL_ID , D.LST_PHONE_NM AS LST_MODEL_NM , B.USIM_MODID AS LST_USIM_ID , B.USIM_MODNM AS LST_USIM_NM , C.SIM_INFO , C.INST_INFO , B.SUB_STATUS_DATE , B.SUB_STATUS_RSN_CODE , B.BAN FROM MSP_3G_SUB_CONTNUM A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B , MSP_REQUEST_DTL C , MSP_DAILY_CLOSE_STTC D WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.CONTRACT_NUM = C.CONTRACT_NUM AND C.CONTRACT_NUM = D.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.SUB_STATUS != 'C' AND B.PPPO = 'PO' ) AA WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM MSP_DAILY_3G_SUB WHERE STDR_DT = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE-1,'YYYYMMDD') AND CONTRACT_NUM = AA.CONTRACT_NUM)
